use_cases: Hero section background for SaaS landing pages
Decorative animated backdrop for marketing websites
Interactive background element for tech product showcases
Visual depth layer for modern web application interfaces
ai_summary: A canvas-based isometric wave grid background component featuring mouse-interactive wave physics animations. The component renders a dynamic grid with configurable color, animation speed, and grid density, creating an engaging visual depth effect. Ideal for modern tech landing pages and hero sections needing animated decorative backgrounds.
